commands: vite install # should install packages first
vite why testnpm2 # should show why package is installed (uses npm explain)
vite explain testnpm2 # should work with explain alias
vite why test-vite-plus-package # should show why dev package is installed
vite why testnpm2 --json # should support json output
vite why testnpm2 test-vite-plus-package # should support multiple packages
vite why testnpm2 --long # should warn that --long not supported by npm
vite why testnpm2 --parseable # should warn that --parseable not supported by npm
vite why testnpm2 -P # should warn that --prod not supported by npm
vite why testnpm2 --find-by customFinder # should warn that --find-by not supported by npm
vite why testnpm2 -- --omit=dev # should support pass through arguments
